name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
💡 *How this bot works*

I send you private reminders on a schedule you pick.

• *Create* — tap ➕ New in the menu
• *Manage* — tap 📋 My reminders
• *Settings* — tap ⚙️ for timezone & snooze

When a reminder fires, tap *Snooze* to delay or *Done* to mark it complete.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
